description: Scale the Jitsi Meet deployment horizontally by adding a second Video Bridge instance (`jvb2`) to the configuration at `/home/ga/jitsi/docker-compose.yml`. The new instance must be configured with the container name `jitsi-jvb2`, UDP port mapping `10001:10001/udp`, and environment variables `JVB_PORT=10001`, `COLIBRI_REST_ENABLED=true`, and `JVB_OSERVER_WS_SERVER_ID=jvb2`. Ensure it depends on `prosody` and connects to the `meet.jitsi` network. Once the second bridge is running, create a report at `/home/ga/jvb_scale_report.txt` containing the total number of running JVB containers, the names of both JVB containers, and their respective UDP ports.
